author: player_a
events_i_witnessed: I bypassed the locker and discovered Tomas hiding in the maintenance wing, clutching a brass canister.
Tomas appears physically compromised, with crystalline frost on his face and collarbone.
Corwin is incapacitated by a sensory hallucination at the workbench and is unaware of Tomas's presence.
beliefs: Tomas is alive, but he is in immediate physical danger and possibly suffering from the 'deep cure' or exposure to some substance here.
The brass canister Tomas is holding is likely the reason he was hidden or why the records were falsified.
Corwin is currently a liability due to his sensory collapse and cannot provide cover while I deal with Tomas.
open_threads: Secure Tomas and determine the nature of the crystalline affliction on his body.
Protect Tomas from whatever the 'Clerk' and Stillwell Hydro are doing.
Figure out what is inside the brass canister.
Get Corwin to regain his senses without drawing unwanted attention.
